default.name: Shane Nelson
default.bio: Runs Omni-Fusion.com, a video production company. Created 11 short films and 60+ music videos. Work featured on ESPN, NBC, MTV, Netflix.

default.name: John Samels (Paper Tiger)
default.bio: Electronic music composer from New York. Founding member of Doomtree hip hop collective. Music featured on Billboard Top 200 albums.

default.name: Jim Morgan
default.bio: Minneapolis-based sound engineer. Founder of Conduit Sound. 20+ years working on film projects.

default.name: Cynthia Bravo
default.bio: Manager of Supplier Diversity at Walt Disney Company. Over a decade as freelance producer.
